name: Aurora
description: A clean, glassy SaaS kit — cool slate + blue, Sora display, glassmorphism cards and a gradient highlight. Light + dark, EN/AR + RTL. Runnable React app with landing, pricing, dashboard and a components showcase.
prompt: A clean SaaS kit with a glassy dashboard. Blue primary (#3b82f6), Inter body + Sora display, glassmorphism cards, soft glass shadow, light + dark. React-first. Ship a dashboard and a landing page template, with EN/AR + RTL.
agentPrompt:
Build me a website styled exactly like the "Aurora" design from uikit.studio.
Design spec (agent-readable): https://uikit.studio/kit/aurora/llms.txt
Machine manifest: https://uikit.studio/kit/aurora/manifest.json
Reference kit (clone to copy the real components/tokens): https://github.com/uikit-studio/aurora-uikit
Match its color tokens (light + dark), fonts, radius and component set. Keep full dark mode and responsive layout.
